name: 军官雅克·贝尔特朗 | 法国宪兵特勤队
nameZh: 军官雅克·贝尔特朗 | 法国宪兵特勤队
descriptionEn: A highly decorated Officer for the Gendarmerie, Beltram was awarded the Legion of Honor for swapping places with a hostage and thwarting terrorist activity on more than one occasion. Beltram is a hero, a single father, and a passionate consumer of pain au chocolate at all times of day. We do what we have to do.
descriptionZh: 贝尔特朗是宪兵队的一名荣誉军官，因多次交换人质同时伺机化解了恐怖活动而被授予荣誉军团的称号。一个英雄、同时，又是一个单身父亲，以及全天候的巧克力面包控。 我做了那么多改变，只为心中不变。
